featureShowcases.heading: Start playing ZXSnake
featureShowcases.summary: This page explains the first-session flow for ZXSnake: understand the objective, start a run or match, and learn how progress is measured.
body: This matters because a player should be able to move from reading the page into playing without needing hidden instructions.
Players use it when they are new to the app, returning after time away, or checking the expected flow before a session.
bullets: Explains the route from setup into play.
Connects controls, modes, and progress surfaces.
Keeps beginner guidance practical and public-facing.
